title: Malty Shattering Australian Mozzarella Balls
description: This nostalgic Australian snack combines crispy, malty exterior and gooey, melted mozzarella center within a comforting boi.
instructions: Combine the flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl.
Add the olive oil and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add the water and beer to the bowl, stirring until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 10 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Fry the mozzarella balls in batches until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
Drain the balls on paper towels and serve hot.
